title: Filter button opens filter right-sidebar; FolderOpen button removed
description:
Replace the existing dual-button arrangement (filter toggle + FolderOpen) with a single filter button that opens the new filter right-sidebar. The FolderOpen icon and its popup panel are removed entirely. The existing filter button icon is kept but its behavior changes from toggling focus-clear to opening the sidebar.

Scenario: Filter button opens the filter sidebar

Given the user is viewing the kanban board
And the filter sidebar is closed
When the user clicks the filter button in the toolbar
Then the filter right-sidebar opens using the shared RightSidebar component
And the kanban board animates narrower

Scenario: Filter button closes the filter sidebar

Given the filter sidebar is open
When the user clicks the filter button again
Then the filter sidebar closes
And the kanban board animates back to full width

Scenario: FolderOpen button no longer appears

Given the user has virtual projects configured
When the user views the toolbar
Then no FolderOpen folder icon button is present
And the project checkboxes that were in the folder popup are now in the filter sidebar

Scenario: Filter button no longer clears focus directly

Given the user has focused on a particular issue
When the user views the toolbar filter button
Then the filter button does not show a Focused/clear state
And clicking the filter button opens the filter sidebar rather than clearing focus
And focus is only cleared via the focus pill inside the filter sidebar
creator: ryan.porter
